title: Legacy Skyblock
description: Modern Hypixel Skyblock mod aimed to port features from 1.8.9 mods
body:
# Legacy Skyblock
Modern Hypixel Skyblock mod aimed to port features from 1.8.9 mods

## Features


### HUD

#### Action Bar
- Hide Defense
- Hide True Defense
- Hide Florid Zombie Sword's charges


### GUI

#### Middle Click GUI Items
- Replace left click with middle click in GUIs


### Dungeons

#### Hide Damage Splash
- Hide damage splash on mobs while in Dungeons
- Work outside Dungeons
